full_text:
Cheng Ang 程昂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Ang (程昂). Rebelled against Zhu Ling. Cheng Ang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Rebel. Cheng Ang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
